suggestions.title: Wire alerts module into infra entrypoint
suggestions.recommendation: Invoke infra/modules/alerts.bicep from infra/main.bicep and pass location, applicationInsightsResourceId, alert email, and tags.

suggestions.title: Expand tests for alert wiring and shared action group behavior
suggestions.recommendation: Assert the alerts module is referenced from main.bicep and that all three rules use PT5M evaluation and the shared action group.

suggestions.title: Execution failure alert should track failed requests, not exceptions
suggestions.recommendation: Base the execution-failure rule on requests/AppRequests success=false so it aligns with failed function executions.

unresolved.title: Recipient email value enforcement
unresolved.note: Email value is parameterized via rciapalaEmailAddress; deployment must pass rciapala's actual email address.
